sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20500" key="boubwnoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουβωνο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n20500.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βουβών</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:198" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.198</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
